about.title: About
about.description: Frontend developer with a passion for building clean, fast, and accessible web experiences. I turn complex problems into elegant interfaces.
about.bio: I build web apps with React and Next.js. I care about clean code, performance, and getting the details right. Based in Uzbekistan, I work on projects that solve real problems — from e-commerce platforms to interactive brand experiences.
about.skill1Desc: React, Next.js, TypeScript, Tailwind CSS. Building responsive interfaces that feel native.
about.skill2Desc: Figma to code. Clean layouts, thoughtful interactions, pixel-perfect execution.
about.skill3Desc: Node.js, Express, MongoDB. REST APIs and server-side logic.
about.skill4Desc: Git, GitHub, deployment workflows. Clean code from commit to production.

bug.title: The Bug
bug.descBroken: Reality has been corrupted. Bugs have invaded the system.
bug.descFixing: Applying patches and restoring system integrity...
bug.descFixed: Order has been restored. All systems operational.
bug.bugsEliminated: All bugs have been eliminated from this dimension.

projects.title: Featured
projects.description: Each project is a portal to another dimension. Hover to explore, click to enter.
projects.moreText: More artifacts are being forged in the digital void...

items.title: Keyron
items.subtitle: IT Development Company
items.description: A modern IT company website built with React and TailwindCSS. Features software development services, web and mobile apps, team info, portfolio, and contact sections with smooth animations.

items.title: Velocity
items.subtitle: Bicycle Brand Landing
items.description: A modern bicycle brand landing page with smooth animations, interactive elements, and minimalist design. Features bike showcases, maintenance services, upgrades, and benefits sections.

items.title: Indore Plants
items.subtitle: Plant Shop Landing
items.description: A modern plant shop landing page built with TailwindCSS. Features product catalog, services, customer reviews, and contact sections with fully responsive design.

items.title: Fast Food Burger
items.subtitle: Restaurant Landing Page
items.description: A modern burger restaurant landing page with an appetizing light design. Features menu, popular dishes, promotions, and contact info with 3D illustrations and interactive elements.

items.title: Sansiro
items.subtitle: Fashion Clothing Store
items.description: A modern and user-friendly online clothing store. Features product categorization, quick search and filters, product detail pages, and a shopping cart system with fully responsive UI/UX design.

items.title: ABC Auto
items.subtitle: Automotive Marketplace
items.description: A modern online platform for browsing and searching cars. Features car catalog, search and filtering, vehicle detail pages, and intuitive navigation for fast performance and great UX.

finale.description: Every line of code is a thought, every component a memory, every animation a feeling. This is the digital consciousness of a frontend developer.
finale.builtWith: Built with passion and countless cups of coffee
